stemHtml: According to SERA (Standardised European Rules of the Air), when an IFR pilot wants to change from IFR to VFR, he/she must…

options.a: Notify ATC. However, if the weather conditions are VMC during the flight, the flight must remain under IFR.
options.b: Notify ATC. However, if the weather conditions are IMC during the flight, the flight must remain under IFR.
options.c: Request an ATC approval. A change from IFR to VFR does NOT depend on weather conditions.
options.d: Request an ATC approval. The flight should then be performed above 3000 ft AMSL.
